items.title: Therapeutic frontiers in ALS: iPSC-based drug discovery, cell therapy, and gene therapy-Advances through 2026.
items.summary: Three converging therapeutic paradigms-iPSC-based drug discovery, cell transplantation, and gene therapy-have substantially expanded the therapeutic pipeline for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) between 2020 and 2026. The FDA's accelerated approval of tofersen (Qalsody) in April 2023 marked the first treatment targeting a genetic cause of ALS. iPSC-derived drug candidates, including ropinirole and bosutinib, have completed early-phase clinical trials led by Japanese institutions. Cell therapies targeting neuroinflammation through regulatory T cells are being actively explored as immunomodulatory strategies, although efficacy remains to be established in adequately powered trials. Next-generation gene-silencing approaches-including RNA interference (RNAi) therapeutics and AAV-delivered microRNA-entered first-in-human trials in 2024-2025. The identification of STMN2 as a downstream target of TDP-43 dysfunction has opened a potential TDP-43-downstream nucleic acid therapeutic avenue for sporadic ALS, which constitutes approximately 90% of all cases, with company-reported interim data suggesting target engagement in the ongoing Phase 1/2 ANQUR trial (QRL-201). This review synthesizes the latest evidence across all three therapeutic domains, with attention to the hierarchy of evidence, regulatory milestones, and the pioneering contributions of Japanese research groups.
items.titleZh: ALS治疗前沿：基于iPSC的药物发现、细胞治疗与基因治疗——截至2026年的进展
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了2020-2026年间ALS治疗的三大前沿方向：iPSC药物发现、细胞移植和基因治疗。关键进展包括FDA批准首个针对ALS遗传病因的药物tofersen、日本团队主导的iPSC衍生药物（如罗匹尼罗）完成早期试验、以及针对TDP-43下游靶点STMN2的核酸疗法进入临床。
items.insight: 该综述系统整合了ALS三大治疗领域的最新进展，特别强调了TDP-43下游靶点STMN2作为散发性ALS治疗新靶点的潜力，以及日本研究团队在iPSC药物发现中的引领作用，为ALS研究者提供了全面的前沿动态参考。

aiRead.keyFinding: STMN2作为TDP-43下游靶点的发现为散发性ALS提供了新的核酸治疗途径，且相关临床试验已显示靶点结合。
aiRead.limitation: 作为综述，未提供原始数据；细胞疗法的疗效仍需大型试验验证。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注ANQUR试验（QRL-201）的完整数据公布，以及日本团队iPSC衍生药物的后续临床试验结果。

items.abstractZh: 三种汇聚的治疗范式——基于iPSC的药物发现、细胞移植和基因治疗——在2020年至2026年间显著扩展了肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）的治疗管线。2023年4月，FDA加速批准了tofersen（Qalsody），这是首个针对ALS遗传病因的治疗药物。iPSC衍生的候选药物，包括罗匹尼罗和博舒替尼，已由日本机构主导完成早期临床试验。通过调节性T细胞靶向神经炎症的细胞疗法正作为免疫调节策略被积极探索，但其疗效尚需在充分有力的试验中确立。下一代基因沉默方法——包括RNA干扰（RNAi）疗法和AAV递送的microRNA——已于2024-2025年进入首次人体试验。STMN2被确定为TDP-43功能失调的下游靶点，为散发性ALS（约占所有病例的90%）开辟了一条潜在的TDP-43下游核酸治疗途径，公司报告的期中数据显示正在进行的1/2期ANQUR试验（QRL-201）中实现了靶点结合。本综述综合了这三个治疗领域的最新证据，关注证据等级、监管里程碑以及日本研究团队的开拓性贡献。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述涵盖了截至2026年的最新进展，包括2023年FDA批准的tofersen和2024-2025年进入临床的下一代基因沉默疗法，直接关联ALS治疗转化。

items.title: Innate immune crosstalk in ALS/FTD pathogenesis.
items.summary: Marked by protein aggregation, impaired proteostasis, organelle stress, and chronic neuroinflammation, amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) and frontotemporal dementia (FTD) form a clinically, genetically, and pathologically overlapping disease spectrum. Increasing evidence indicates that innate immune activation is not merely a secondary response to neuronal injury, but an active driver of disease progression. In this review, we elaborate on how ALS/FTD-associated genetic lesions and pathogenic protein aggregates, including TDP-43, SOD1, FUS, and C9orf72-derived dipeptide repeat proteins, engage three interconnected innate immune pathways: cGAS-STING, NLRP3 inflammasomes, and TREM2-DAP12 signaling. We further highlight emerging crosstalk among these pathways, in which cGAS-STING and NLRP3 reinforce inflammatory signaling, while NLRP3-driven TREM2 shedding may impair microglial clearance and perpetuate proteostatic failure. Understanding this immune network may help define disease subtypes, identify biomarkers, and guide combinatorial therapeutic strategies that suppress harmful inflammation while preserving protective microglial functions.
items.titleZh: ALS/FTD发病机制中的先天免疫串扰
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述指出，在ALS和FTD中，先天免疫系统的激活不仅仅是神经损伤的后果，而是主动推动疾病进展的关键因素。文章详细分析了三种先天免疫通路（cGAS-STING、NLRP3炎症小体和TREM2-DAP12）如何被疾病相关蛋白（如TDP-43、SOD1、FUS和C9orf72）激活，并揭示了这些通路之间的相互增强作用，为理解疾病机制和开发新疗法提供了新视角。
items.insight: 该综述系统整合了ALS/FTD中先天免疫通路的最新进展，特别是揭示了cGAS-STING、NLRP3和TREM2之间的串扰机制，为研究者提供了从免疫网络角度理解疾病异质性和寻找联合治疗靶点的框架，具有重要的转化指导价值。

aiRead.keyFinding: ALS/FTD中先天免疫通路（cGAS-STING、NLRP3、TREM2-DAP12）之间存在串扰，且这种串扰是疾病进展的主动驱动因素。
aiRead.limitation: 作为综述，未提供新的实验数据，结论基于现有文献的整合。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注针对cGAS-STING或NLRP3通路的抑制剂在ALS/FTD动物模型中的验证研究，以及TREM2作为治疗靶点的临床前进展。

items.abstractZh: 以蛋白质聚集、蛋白质稳态失衡、细胞器应激和慢性神经炎症为特征，肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）和额颞叶痴呆（FTD）构成了一个临床、遗传和病理上重叠的疾病谱系。越来越多的证据表明，先天免疫激活不仅是神经元损伤的继发性反应，而且是疾病进展的主动驱动因素。在这篇综述中，我们详细阐述了ALS/FTD相关的遗传缺陷和致病性蛋白聚集体（包括TDP-43、SOD1、FUS和C9orf72衍生的二肽重复蛋白）如何参与三种相互关联的先天免疫通路：cGAS-STING、NLRP3炎症小体和TREM2-DAP12信号通路。我们进一步强调了这些通路之间新出现的串扰，其中cGAS-STING和NLRP3增强炎症信号，而NLRP3驱动的TREM2脱落可能损害小胶质细胞清除功能并持续蛋白质稳态失败。理解这一免疫网络可能有助于定义疾病亚型、识别生物标志物，并指导组合治疗策略，以抑制有害炎症同时保留保护性小胶质细胞功能。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，聚焦于ALS/FTD中先天免疫通路串扰这一前沿方向，具有高度ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: PBMC DEG/miRNA biomarkers of TDP-43 pathology in ALS.
items.summary: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) lacks reliable, disease-specific, and minimally invasive biomarkers, representing a major barrier to early diagnosis and patient stratification. The primary aim of this translational pilot study was to identify a disease-specific, TDP-43-related, gene-microRNA (miRNA) signature in peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) of ALS patients with potential diagnostic value. To this end, we first identified differentially expressed disease-specific genes (dsDEGs) using a TDP-43-based rat model of ALS, generated by stereotaxic infusion of full-length (FL) TAR DNA-binding protein 43 (TDP-43) into the motor cortex. Transcriptomic profiling of the motor cortex revealed candidate dsDEGs, which were subsequently validated by RT-qPCR in motor cortex, spinal cord, and PBMCs from the same animals. To assess translational relevance, expression levels of these dsDEGs were analyzed in PBMCs from early- to mid-stage ALS patients and matched healthy controls, while disease specificity was evaluated using Parkinson's disease (PD) samples. In parallel, conserved miRNAs predicted to target the identified dsDEGs were examined in both rat and human PBMCs. Five dsDEGs, Mctp1, Penk, Mt2A, Drd1, and Rasgrp2, were consistently dysregulated across central and peripheral tissues in the TDP-43 rat model. RT-qPCR analysis of human PBMCs confirmed significant and selective dysregulation of these genes in ALS, but not in PD, supporting disease specificity. Moreover, exposure of human neuroblastoma cells and healthy PBMCs to TDP-43 recapitulated the ALS-like expression changes. Computational and experimental analyses identified seven conserved miRNAs targeting these dsDEGs, of which four were significantly downregulated in ALS PBMCs, supporting a coordinated regulatory network. Receiver operating characteristic (ROC) analyses demonstrated strong discriminative performance for both the gene signature (AUC 0.87-1.00) and the associated miRNAs (AUC 0.95-1.00). Together, these findings define a novel PBMC-based gene-miRNA signature that mirrors central ALS pathology and shows high diagnostic accuracy and disease specificity, highlighting its potential as a minimally invasive biomarker for ALS.
items.titleZh: ALS中TDP-43病理的PBMC DEG/miRNA生物标志物
items.summaryZh: 本研究在ALS患者外周血单核细胞（PBMC）中发现了一组由5个基因（Mctp1、Penk、Mt2A、Drd1、Rasgrp2）和4个miRNA组成的特征，该特征在TDP-43大鼠模型和ALS患者中均显著失调，且对帕金森病具有特异性。ROC分析显示该特征具有很高的诊断准确性（AUC 0.87-1.00）。
items.insight: 该研究首次在PBMC中建立了与中枢TDP-43病理直接相关的基因-miRNA联合特征，为开发ALS的微创液体活检提供了高特异性和高准确性的候选标志物，对早期诊断和患者分层具有重要转化价值。

aiRead.studyType: 转化性生物标志物研究（动物模型+临床样本验证）
aiRead.keyFinding: 在ALS患者PBMC中鉴定出5个基因和4个miRNA组成的诊断特征，AUC达0.87-1.00，且对帕金森病具有特异性。
aiRead.limitation: 样本量可能有限（未明确说明），且为横断面研究，需在更大队列和纵向样本中验证其稳定性和预测价值。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注该特征在更大规模、多中心ALS队列中的验证结果，以及其与疾病进展和TDP-43病理负荷的纵向关联。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）缺乏可靠、疾病特异且微创的生物标志物，这构成了早期诊断和患者分层的主要障碍。这项转化性初步研究的主要目的是在ALS患者的外周血单核细胞（PBMC）中识别一种具有潜在诊断价值的疾病特异性、TDP-43相关的基因-微小RNA（miRNA）特征。为此，我们首先使用基于TDP-43的ALS大鼠模型（通过将全长TDP-43立体定向注入运动皮层生成）识别了差异表达的疾病特异性基因（dsDEG）。运动皮层的转录组分析揭示了候选dsDEG，随后通过RT-qPCR在同一动物的运动皮层、脊髓和PBMC中进行了验证。为了评估转化相关性，分析了早期至中期ALS患者和匹配健康对照PBMC中这些dsDEG的表达水平，并使用帕金森病（PD）样本评估了疾病特异性。同时，在预测靶向已识别dsDEG的保守miRNA在大鼠和人类PBMC中进行了检测。在TDP-43大鼠模型中，五个dsDEG（Mctp1、Penk、Mt2A、Drd1和Rasgrp2）在中枢和外周组织中一致失调。人类PBMC的RT-qPCR分析证实了这些基因在ALS中显著且选择性地失调，而在PD中则不然，支持了疾病特异性。此外，将人神经母细胞瘤细胞和健康PBMC暴露于TDP-43重现了类似ALS的表达变化。计算和实验分析识别了七个靶向这些dsDEG的保守miRNA，其中四个在ALS PBMC中显著下调，支持一个协调的调控网络。受试者工作特征（ROC）分析显示，基因特征（AUC 0.87-1.00）和相关miRNA（AUC 0.95-1.00）均具有强大的区分性能。总之，这些发现定义了一种新的基于PBMC的基因-miRNA特征，该特征反映了中枢ALS病理，并显示出高诊断准确性和疾病特异性，突显了其作为ALS微创生物标志物的潜力。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究于2026年发表，利用TDP-43大鼠模型与临床样本的交叉验证，在PBMC中鉴定出具有高诊断准确性和疾病特异性的基因-miRNA特征，直接关联ALS核心病理，具有显著的转化价值。

items.title: Early-onset neuroinflammation drives neurodegeneration caused by lysosomal PI(3,5)P 2 insufficiency.
items.summary: Phosphatidylinositol 3,5-bisphosphate [PI(3,5)P 2 ] is a lysosomal signaling lipid whose deficiency, caused by mutations in the PIKfyve complex subunits FIG4 or VAC14, underlies a spectrum of fatal neurologic diseases including Charcot-Marie-Tooth type 4J (CMT4J) and amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). To map the molecular consequences of PI(3,5)P 2 insufficiency in the brain, we performed quantitative proteomic and transcriptomic analyses of three mouse lines bearing distinct loss-of-function mutations in Fig4 or Vac14, examining the brain at the presymptomatic and end stages. Strikingly, profound neuroinflammation was already present at postnatal day 5 (before significant neurodegeneration), characterized by complement activation, interferon signaling, and parenchymal infiltration of peripheral myeloid cells and T-cells. Isolated mutant microglia exhibited a markedly pro-oxidative transcriptional state with elevated reactive oxygen species, a partly non-cell-autonomous phenotype, being present in microglia from mice with conditional Fig4 inactivation in just neurons and astrocytes. Comparison of early (P5) and late (P25) proteomics data revealed that PI(3,5)P 2 insufficiency impairs developmental remodeling of the brain proteome: proteins typically upregulated during postnatal maturation failed to accumulate, implicating lysosomal function in neurodevelopment. We identify coordinated elevation of p53, Fas receptor, inflammatory caspases, Gasdermin D, RIPK1, and ZBP1, consistent with multifactorial inflammatory cell death with features of apoptosis, pyroptosis, and necroptosis. Many of the dysregulated proteins are encoded by genes mutated in lysosomal storage disorders, ALS, CMT, Alzheimer's and Parkinson diseases, extending the pathogenic relevance of PI(3,5)P 2 insufficiency. Together, these findings establish that early neuroinflammation is a defining - and likely initiating - feature of neurodegeneration caused by disruption of lysosomal PI(3,5)P 2 .
items.titleZh: 早发性神经炎症驱动由溶酶体PI(3,5)P₂不足引起的神经退行性变
items.summaryZh: 该研究通过三种不同基因突变小鼠模型，发现溶酶体PI(3,5)P₂脂质不足在神经退行性变发生前即引发强烈的早期神经炎症，包括补体激活、干扰素信号和外周免疫细胞浸润。小胶质细胞呈现促氧化状态，且这种炎症部分由神经元和星形胶质细胞非细胞自主驱动。研究还揭示了发育期蛋白质组重塑受阻及多种炎症性细胞死亡通路（凋亡、焦亡、坏死性凋亡）的协同激活。
items.insight: 该研究首次系统证明PI(3,5)P₂不足引发的神经炎症是神经退行性变的早期启动事件而非继发结果，为ALS等疾病提供了新的治疗时间窗——在神经元显著丢失前靶向神经炎症可能具有保护作用。

aiRead.keyFinding: 溶酶体PI(3,5)P₂不足在神经退行性变发生前即引发早发性神经炎症，且炎症涉及多种细胞死亡通路，小胶质细胞表型部分由神经元和星形胶质细胞非细胞自主驱动。
aiRead.limitation: 研究基于小鼠模型，人类患者中PI(3,5)P₂不足与神经炎症的时序关系及具体机制尚需验证。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注PI(3,5)P₂通路在ALS患者脑脊液或尸检组织中的炎症标志物验证，以及靶向早期神经炎症（如补体或干扰素通路）的干预研究。

items.abstractZh: 磷脂酰肌醇3,5-二磷酸[PI(3,5)P₂]是一种溶酶体信号脂质，其缺乏由PIKfyve复合体亚基FIG4或VAC14突变引起，是包括Charcot-Marie-Tooth 4J型（CMT4J）和肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）在内的一系列致命性神经系统疾病的基础。为了绘制大脑中PI(3,5)P₂不足的分子后果，我们对三种携带Fig4或Vac14不同功能缺失突变的小鼠品系进行了定量蛋白质组学和转录组学分析，检查了症状前和终末期的大脑。引人注目的是，在出生后第5天（在显著的神经退行性变之前）已经存在深刻的神经炎症，其特征是补体激活、干扰素信号传导以及外周髓系细胞和T细胞的实质浸润。分离的突变小胶质细胞表现出显著促氧化的转录状态，伴有升高的活性氧，这是一种部分非细胞自主的表型，存在于仅神经元和星形胶质细胞中条件性失活Fig4的小鼠的小胶质细胞中。早期（P5）和晚期（P25）蛋白质组学数据的比较显示，PI(3,5)P₂不足损害了大脑蛋白质组的发育重塑：通常在出生后成熟过程中上调的蛋白质未能积累，暗示溶酶体功能在神经发育中的作用。我们确定了p53、Fas受体、炎症性半胱天冬酶、Gasdermin D、RIPK1和ZBP1的协调升高，与具有凋亡、焦亡和坏死性凋亡特征的多因素炎症性细胞死亡一致。许多失调的蛋白质由在溶酶体贮积症、ALS、CMT、阿尔茨海默病和帕金森病中突变的基因编码，扩展了PI(3,5)P₂不足的致病相关性。总之，这些发现确立了早期神经炎症是由溶酶体PI(3,5)P₂破坏引起的神经退行性变的一个定义性——且可能是起始性——特征。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究发表于2026年，通过多组学分析揭示了PI(3,5)P₂不足导致ALS等神经退行性疾病的早期炎症启动机制，具有直接的ALS相关性。

items.titleZh: 教学视频神经影像：超越认知——PSEN1 c.1292C>A（哈利斯科奠基者效应）变异相关的肌萎缩侧索硬化样疾病
items.summaryZh: 该研究通过教学视频神经影像形式，报道了携带PSEN1 c.1292C>A（哈利斯科奠基者效应）变异的患者出现类似肌萎缩侧索硬化的运动神经元病表现，提示该变异可能不仅导致认知障碍，还可引起ALS样表型。
items.insight: 该报道为ALS研究者提供了PSEN1基因变异与运动神经元病关联的新证据，拓展了ALS的遗传病因谱，尤其对携带哈利斯科奠基者效应变异的特定人群具有重要临床和遗传咨询意义。

aiRead.keyFinding: PSEN1 c.1292C>A变异可导致ALS样运动神经元病，超越其已知的认知障碍表型。
aiRead.limitation: 仅基于单例或少数病例，缺乏系统队列验证；教学视频形式可能限制详细临床数据呈现。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注PSEN1变异在更大ALS队列中的携带频率及表型谱研究，以及该变异对ALS发病机制的潜在影响。

items.title: Drivers of Rising Prevalence in Major Motor Neurodegenerative Diseases: Temporal Trends in Sweden and France (2003-2022).
items.summary: The prevalence of Parkinson disease (PD), multiple sclerosis (MS), and motor neuron diseases (MNDs) is rising globally. However, it is unclear to what degree this is related to an increase in incidence or to improved survival after diagnosis. We performed 2 nationwide, population-based, retrospective cohort studies, including all individuals living in Sweden between 2001 and 2016 and living in France between 2009 and 2022, respectively. Pooled mixed-effects regression models, with country as a random effect, were used to determine temporal trends in prevalence, crude and age-standardized and sex-standardized incidence, and age and life expectancy at diagnosis. Annualized prevalence of PD, MS, and MNDs increased significantly between 2003 and 2022 in the pooled model (PD: prevalence ratio [PR] per year = 1.014, p < 0.001; MS: PR = 1.029, p < 0.001; MND: PR = 1.028, p < 0.001). While the crude incidence of both PD and MS remained nearly stable over time (PD: incidence rate ratio [IRR] per year = 0.998, p < 0.001; MS: IRR = 0.992, p < 0.001), the standardized incidence showed a more marked decrease for PD (IRR = 0.986, p < 0.001) while remaining almost unchanged for MS (IRR = 0.995, p < 0.001). For MNDs, both the crude and standardized incidence increased over time (crude IRR = 1.018, p < 0.001; standardized IRR = 1.008, p < 0.001). Life expectancy at diagnosis of PD increased between 2003 and 2013 (+0.95 months per calendar year, p < 0.001) and then decreased between 2013 and 2022 (-1.20 months, p = 0.002), while it increased significantly over the entire study period for MS (+2.35 months, p < 0.001) and MNDs (+0.34 months, p = 0.01). These findings indicate that the rising MS prevalence is largely survival-driven and the rising MND prevalence reflects a true increase in incidence, whereas PD prevalence grows modestly, largely independent of incidence. Depending on the mechanism that drives prevalence, whether increased incidence reflecting changing risk factor exposures, improved survival due to therapeutic advances, or demographic aging of the population, inferences about underlying causes differ substantially between PD, MS, and MNDs, with direct implications for health care planning and etiologic research.
items.titleZh: 主要运动神经退行性疾病患病率上升的驱动因素：瑞典和法国的时间趋势（2003-2022年）
items.summaryZh: 基于瑞典和法国的大规模人群数据，分析2003-2022年间帕金森病、多发性硬化和运动神经元病患病率上升的驱动因素。结果显示，运动神经元病患病率上升主要源于发病率真实增加，而非生存改善。
items.insight: 该研究为ALS研究者提供了关键流行病学证据：运动神经元病（包括ALS）患病率上升主要由发病率增加驱动，提示环境或遗传风险因素可能正在变化，而非仅因诊断或治疗进步。这支持加强病因学研究和预防策略。

aiRead.studyType: 基于人群的回顾性队列研究
aiRead.keyFinding: 运动神经元病患病率上升主要由发病率真实增加驱动，而非生存改善。
aiRead.limitation: 研究基于瑞典和法国数据，可能不直接推广至其他地区；未区分运动神经元病亚型（如ALS与原发性侧索硬化）。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注后续研究是否进一步分析运动神经元病发病率上升的具体风险因素，以及不同亚型（如ALS）的独立趋势。

items.abstractZh: 帕金森病（PD）、多发性硬化（MS）和运动神经元病（MND）的患病率在全球范围内上升。然而，这在多大程度上与发病率增加或诊断后生存率改善有关尚不清楚。我们进行了两项全国性、基于人群的回顾性队列研究，分别纳入2001年至2016年间生活在瑞典的所有个体和2009年至2022年间生活在法国的所有个体。采用以国家为随机效应的混合效应回归模型，确定患病率、粗和年龄及性别标准化发病率、诊断时年龄和预期寿命的时间趋势。在合并模型中，2003年至2022年间PD、MS和MND的年化患病率显著增加（PD：患病率比[PR]每年=1.014，p<0.001；MS：PR=1.029，p<0.001；MND：PR=1.028，p<0.001）。虽然PD和MS的粗发病率随时间保持基本稳定（PD：发病率比[IRR]每年=0.998，p<0.001；MS：IRR=0.992，p<0.001），但标准化发病率显示PD下降更明显（IRR=0.986，p<0.001），而MS几乎不变（IRR=0.995，p<0.001）。对于MND，粗和标准化发病率均随时间增加（粗IRR=1.018，p<0.001；标准化IRR=1.008，p<0.001）。PD诊断时预期寿命在2003年至2013年间增加（每年+0.95个月，p<0.001），然后在2013年至2022年间下降（-1.20个月，p=0.002），而MS（+2.35个月，p<0.001）和MND（+0.34个月，p=0.01）在整个研究期间显著增加。这些发现表明，MS患病率上升主要由生存率驱动，MND患病率上升反映了发病率的真实增加，而PD患病率增长温和，基本与发病率无关。根据驱动患病率的机制——是反映风险因素暴露变化的发病率增加、治疗进步带来的生存改善，还是人口老龄化——PD、MS和MND的潜在原因推断存在显著差异，这对医疗保健规划和病因学研究具有直接影响。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究基于2022年最新数据，直接揭示ALS相关运动神经元病发病率真实上升，具有高度ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: Inhibitory effect of silymarin on amyloid formation in ALS-associated hSOD1 P66R mutant.
items.summary: The aberrant aggregation of human superoxide dismutase 1 (hSOD1) into β-sheet-rich amyloid fibrils is a crucial process in the pathogenesis of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), enhancing motor neuron degeneration and disease progression. The P66R mutation in SOD1 destabilizes local structure and promotes β-sheet-driven fibrillation, which makes it a suitable model for exploring approaches for reducing pathogenic aggregation. Here, we evaluate silymarin, a polyphenolic compound with known antioxidant and neuroprotective properties, for its potential to inhibit P66R-hSOD1 aggregation. ThT fluorescence and transmission electron microscopy analyses demonstrate a significant decrease in amyloid fibril formation in the presence of silymarin; in addition, FTIR spectroscopy confirms the suppression of β-sheet formation. Fluorescence quenching and ANS binding assays indicate a moderate-affinity binding between silymarin and the mutant protein, along with a reduction in surface hydrophobicity. Hemolysis assays confirm its protective effect against membrane damage induced by aggregates, while molecular docking and dynamic simulations indicate that silymarin stabilizes aggregation-prone areas with hydrogen bonding and hydrophobic interactions, thereby promoting compact conformations and reducing solvent-exposed surfaces. The findings identified silymarin as an effective anti-amyloidogenic agent that reduces β-sheet accumulation and fibril formation while also decreasing cytotoxicity, highlighting its potential as a therapeutic candidate for ALS.
items.titleZh: 水飞蓟素对ALS相关hSOD1 P66R突变体淀粉样蛋白形成的抑制作用
items.summaryZh: 水飞蓟素在体外实验中能有效抑制ALS相关SOD1 P66R突变蛋白的异常聚集，减少淀粉样纤维形成和细胞毒性，提示其可能成为ALS的潜在治疗候选物。
items.insight: 该研究首次系统评估了水飞蓟素对SOD1 P66R突变体聚集的抑制作用，结合多种实验和计算手段揭示了其抗淀粉样蛋白生成的机制，为开发基于天然产物的ALS治疗策略提供了新线索。

aiRead.keyFinding: 水飞蓟素通过结合SOD1 P66R突变蛋白、稳定其构象，显著减少β-折叠聚集和纤维形成，并降低细胞毒性。
aiRead.limitation: 仅基于体外实验和计算模拟，缺乏体内动物模型验证，且未评估水飞蓟素在ALS动物模型中的疗效和安全性。
aiRead.watchNext: 后续应关注水飞蓟素在SOD1转基因ALS小鼠模型中的体内验证，以及其与其他治疗策略的联合应用效果。

items.abstractZh: 人类超氧化物歧化酶1（hSOD1）异常聚集形成富含β-折叠的淀粉样纤维是肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）发病机制中的关键过程，会加剧运动神经元变性和疾病进展。SOD1中的P66R突变使局部结构不稳定并促进β-折叠驱动的纤维化，使其成为探索减少致病性聚集方法的合适模型。本研究评估了水飞蓟素（一种具有已知抗氧化和神经保护特性的多酚化合物）抑制P66R-hSOD1聚集的潜力。ThT荧光和透射电子显微镜分析表明，在水飞蓟素存在下，淀粉样纤维形成显著减少；此外，FTIR光谱证实了β-折叠形成的抑制。荧光猝灭和ANS结合实验表明水飞蓟素与突变蛋白之间存在中等亲和力的结合，同时表面疏水性降低。溶血实验证实了其对聚集体诱导的膜损伤的保护作用，而分子对接和动力学模拟表明，水飞蓟素通过氢键和疏水相互作用稳定了易聚集区域，从而促进紧凑构象并减少溶剂暴露表面。研究结果确定水飞蓟素是一种有效的抗淀粉样蛋白生成剂，可减少β-折叠积累和纤维形成，同时降低细胞毒性，突显其作为ALS治疗候选药物的潜力。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究发表于2026年，聚焦于天然多酚化合物水飞蓟素对ALS相关SOD1突变体聚集的抑制作用，具有直接的ALS转化价值。

items.source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
items.title: IRE1 regulates the proteostasis of TDP-43/TARDBP in ALS/FTD through ribosome-associated quality control.
items.summary: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) and frontotemporal dementia (FTD) are progressive neurodegenerative disorders characterized by motor neuron degeneration, leading to muscle weakness, atrophy, and cognitive impairments. A defining pathological hallmark of ALS/FTD is the cytosolic mislocalization and accumulation of TAR DNA-binding protein 43 (TDP-43), highlighting its critical role in ALS pathogenesis. However, the molecular mechanisms underlying TDP-43 proteostasis remain poorly understood. Through a genetic screening approach, we identify inositol-requiring enzyme 1 (IRE1), an endoplasmic reticulum-resident transmembrane protein, as a potent suppressor of TDP-43 protein levels. Furthermore, we show that ribosome-associated quality control (RQC) factors play a crucial role in regulating TDP-43 proteostasis and cellular toxicity. Activation of the RQC pathway prevents excessive accumulation of TDP-43 and associated toxicity. Mechanistically, our findings suggest that IRE1 regulates TDP-43 protein level by promoting the degradation of aberrant TDP-43 translation product through the RQC pathway. IRE1 acts canonically to enhance the transcription of the RQC core component Clbn/NEMF and noncanonically to physically interact with Clbn/NEMF, thereby ameliorating TDP-43-induced proteotoxicity. Moreover, ectopic expression or pharmacological activation of IRE1 alleviates TDP-43 pathology and restores cognitive function in the TDP-43 A315T ALS mouse models. Collectively, our study identifies a role for IRE1 in the translational quality control of TDP-43 and establishes its potential as a therapeutic target for ALS/FTD.
items.titleZh: IRE1通过核糖体相关质量控制调控ALS/FTD中TDP-43/TARDBP的蛋白稳态
items.summaryZh: 该研究通过遗传筛选发现IRE1是TDP-43蛋白水平的抑制因子，并揭示IRE1通过核糖体相关质量控制（RQC）通路降解异常TDP-43翻译产物，从而维持蛋白稳态。在ALS小鼠模型中，激活IRE1可减轻TDP-43病理并改善认知功能。
items.insight: 该研究首次将IRE1与TDP-43的翻译质量控制联系起来，为理解ALS/FTD中TDP-43蛋白稳态失调的机制提供了新视角，并提示IRE1可能成为治疗TDP-43蛋白病的药物靶点。

aiRead.studyType: 机制研究（动物/细胞实验）
aiRead.keyFinding: IRE1通过经典和非经典途径激活RQC通路，促进异常TDP-43翻译产物的降解，从而减轻TDP-43病理并改善ALS小鼠模型的认知功能。
aiRead.limitation: 研究主要基于小鼠模型和细胞实验，IRE1在人类ALS患者中的具体作用及长期安全性尚需进一步验证。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注IRE1激动剂在ALS/FTD患者中的临床试验进展，以及RQC通路其他组分在TDP-43蛋白病中的作用。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）和额颞叶痴呆（FTD）是进行性神经退行性疾病，以运动神经元退化为特征，导致肌肉无力、萎缩和认知障碍。ALS/FTD的一个决定性病理标志是TAR DNA结合蛋白43（TDP-43）在胞质中的错误定位和积累，突显了其在ALS发病机制中的关键作用。然而，TDP-43蛋白稳态的分子机制仍知之甚少。通过遗传筛选方法，我们鉴定出内质网驻留跨膜蛋白肌醇需求酶1（IRE1）是TDP-43蛋白水平的有效抑制因子。此外，我们发现核糖体相关质量控制（RQC）因子在调控TDP-43蛋白稳态和细胞毒性中发挥关键作用。RQC通路的激活可防止TDP-43的过度积累及其相关毒性。机制上，我们的发现表明IRE1通过RQC通路促进异常TDP-43翻译产物的降解来调控TDP-43蛋白水平。IRE1通过经典途径增强RQC核心组分Clbn/NEMF的转录，并通过非经典途径与Clbn/NEMF发生物理相互作用，从而改善TDP-43诱导的蛋白毒性。此外，在TDP-43 A315T ALS小鼠模型中，IRE1的异位表达或药理学激活可减轻TDP-43病理并恢复认知功能。总之，我们的研究确定了IRE1在TDP-43翻译质量控制中的作用，并确立了其作为ALS/FTD治疗靶点的潜力。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究发表于2026年，揭示了IRE1通过RQC通路调控TDP-43蛋白稳态的新机制，具有直接的ALS相关性，并提供了体内药理学验证，具备转化价值。

items.title: At-Home Versus in-Clinic Vital Capacity Measurement: Insights From the HEALEY ALS Platform Trial.
items.summary: Respiratory weakness, typically monitored as vital capacity (VC), is a central feature of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). VC is increasingly measured remotely in participants' homes, although in-clinic assessment remains the standard. We tested concordance between at-home and in-clinic VC to determine trial eligibility, track progression, and predict survival in a large ALS trial. At-home and in-clinic VC were assessed at baseline and approximately every 8 weeks for a year in the first four regimens of the HEALEY ALS Platform Trial. At-home assessments were coached via live videoconference and centrally reviewed. VC measurements, expressed as percent of predicted normal (%PN), were compared cross-sectionally, longitudinally, and for predicting survival time. Data from 233 participants with 3-8 paired at-home and in-clinic VC assessments completed < 14 days apart were analyzed. At-home and in-clinic VC were well correlated (Lin's r c = 0.82) with no systematic bias. At-home VC ≥ 60%PN predicted in-clinic VC ≥ 60%PN with a positive predictive value of 91% and a negative predictive value of 65%. VC slopes were moderately correlated (r c = 0.68). At-home VC progressed 28% faster than in-clinic VC with proportionately less variance (at-home [SE] = -1.882 [0.153] %PN/month, in-clinic = -1.476 [0.131] %PN/month). Slopes of at-home and in-clinic VC explained 15% and 17% of variation in future survival time, respectively. At-home and in-clinic VC were well correlated cross-sectionally. At-home VC performed well tracking longitudinal change and predicting survival. The reduced participant burden of assessment and concordance with in-clinic measurement support use of at-home monitoring of VC.
items.titleZh: 居家与诊室肺活量测量的一致性：来自HEALEY ALS平台试验的见解
items.summaryZh: HEALEY ALS平台试验显示，居家通过视频指导测量的肺活量与诊室测量结果高度一致，能有效追踪疾病进展和预测生存期，且居家测量进展速度略快但变异更小。
items.insight: 该研究为ALS临床试验中采用远程肺活量监测提供了关键证据，支持居家评估作为可靠终点，可降低参与者负担并提高试验可行性。

aiRead.keyFinding: 居家与诊室肺活量测量在横断面和纵向上高度一致，居家测量可有效预测生存期。
aiRead.limitation: 居家测量进展速度比诊室快28%，可能反映测量条件差异或真实进展加速，需进一步验证。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注居家肺活量测量在ALS临床试验中作为主要或次要终点的标准化应用，以及不同远程监测技术的比较研究。

items.abstractZh: 呼吸肌无力是肌萎缩侧索硬化（ALS）的核心特征，通常通过肺活量（VC）监测。VC越来越多地在参与者家中远程测量，尽管诊室评估仍是标准。我们在大型ALS试验中测试了居家与诊室VC之间的一致性，以确定试验资格、追踪疾病进展并预测生存期。在HEALEY ALS平台试验的前四个方案中，在基线和大约每8周（持续一年）评估居家和诊室VC。居家评估通过实时视频会议指导并由中心审查。VC测量值以预测正常值百分比（%PN）表示，进行了横断面、纵向比较以及预测生存时间的分析。分析了233名参与者的数据，这些参与者在<14天内完成了3-8次配对的居家和诊室VC评估。居家与诊室VC相关性良好（Lin's r c = 0.82），无系统性偏差。居家VC ≥ 60%PN预测诊室VC ≥ 60%PN的阳性预测值为91%，阴性预测值为65%。VC斜率中度相关（r c = 0.68）。居家VC进展速度比诊室VC快28%，且方差比例较小（居家[SE] = -1.882 [0.153] %PN/月，诊室 = -1.476 [0.131] %PN/月）。居家和诊室VC的斜率分别解释了未来生存时间变异的15%和17%。居家与诊室VC在横断面上相关性良好。居家VC在追踪纵向变化和预测生存方面表现良好。评估的参与者负担减轻以及与诊室测量的一致性支持使用居家VC监测。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究基于2026年发表的HEALEY平台试验数据，直接验证了居家肺活量测量在ALS临床试验中的转化价值，为远程监测的标准化提供了新近依据。

items.title: Lysophagy protects against ANXA11 amyloid fibril toxicity and propagation in FTLD.
items.summary: Accumulation of Annexin A11 (ANXA11) aggregates is a distinct pathological hallmark of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) and frontotemporal lobar degeneration (FTLD). While genetic studies have linked ANXA11 mutations (e.g., D40G) to disease, the precise molecular events converting aggregation into neurotoxicity and intercellular propagation remain elusive. We hypothesize that lysosomal integrity serves as a critical checkpoint in ANXA11 proteinopathy and that its failure drives disease progression. To model the human pathology of ANXA11, we generated pre-formed fibrils (PFFs) of wild-type and FTLD/ALS-linked D40G mutant ANXA11. Human iPSC-derived neurons, 3D cerebral organoids, and bulk RNA-sequencing were employed to investigate neurotoxicity. High-resolution imaging, lentiviral knockdown, and biochemical assays were performed to delineate the lysosomal damage response and the subsequent "prion-like" spreading of aggregates. The internalized ANXA11 fibrils accumulated in lysosomes, triggering lysosomal membrane permeabilization (LMP). The D40G mutation exacerbated this toxicity, leading to severe LMP, mitochondrial depolarization, and specific transcriptional downregulation of the dynactin subunit ACTR10. Mechanistically, we identified a protective signaling axis involving p38 MAPK, MK2, and HSP27 that senses ANXA11-induced lysosomal damage and initiates lysophagy. Notably, in human cerebral organoids, failure of this lysophagic clearance facilitated the cytoplasmic escape of ANXA11, thereby accelerating its seeding activity and propagation to neighboring cells. Pharmacological or genetic modulation of this pathway significantly altered neuronal survival. Our study established lysosomal rupture as a primary driver of ANXA11-associated neurodegeneration and validated the p38/MK2/HSP27 axis as a crucial defense mechanism in human neural tissue. These findings provide a novel mechanistic link between lysosomal quality control and ANXA11 propagation, highlighting that enhancing lysophagic flux represents a promising translational strategy to halt the progression of FTLD and ALS.
items.titleZh: 溶酶体自噬保护FTLD中ANXA11淀粉样纤维毒性和传播
items.summaryZh: 该研究揭示ANXA11蛋白聚集体通过破坏溶酶体膜引发神经毒性，而p38/MK2/HSP27信号轴介导的溶酶体自噬是关键的细胞防御机制；D40G突变加剧溶酶体损伤，导致线粒体功能障碍和ACTR10下调；增强溶酶体自噬可减少ANXA11的胞质逃逸和细胞间传播，为ALS/FTLD提供潜在治疗靶点。
items.insight: 该研究首次在人类iPSC衍生神经元和脑类器官中系统阐明ANXA11蛋白病中溶酶体损伤的核心作用，并鉴定出p38/MK2/HSP27轴作为可干预的防御通路，为开发针对溶酶体质量控制的新疗法提供了直接依据。

aiRead.studyType: 机制研究（体外细胞和类器官模型）
aiRead.keyFinding: ANXA11纤维通过诱导溶酶体膜透化引发神经毒性，p38/MK2/HSP27轴介导的溶酶体自噬是限制其传播的关键防御机制。
aiRead.limitation: 研究基于体外和类器官模型，缺乏体内动物模型验证；未探讨其他ANXA11突变或非神经元细胞类型的影响。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注该通路在ALS/FTLD动物模型中的验证，以及靶向p38/MK2/HSP27轴的小分子药物开发进展。

items.abstractZh: 膜联蛋白A11（ANXA11）聚集体的积累是肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）和额颞叶变性（FTLD）的独特病理标志。虽然遗传学研究已将ANXA11突变（如D40G）与疾病联系起来，但将聚集转化为神经毒性和细胞间传播的精确分子事件仍不清楚。我们假设溶酶体完整性是ANXA11蛋白病的关键检查点，其失败驱动疾病进展。为模拟ANXA11的人类病理，我们生成了野生型和FTLD/ALS相关D40G突变型ANXA11的预形成纤维（PFFs）。采用人iPSC衍生神经元、3D脑类器官和批量RNA测序研究神经毒性。通过高分辨率成像、慢病毒敲低和生化实验描绘溶酶体损伤反应及随后的聚集体“类朊病毒”传播。内化的ANXA11纤维在溶酶体中积累，触发溶酶体膜透化（LMP）。D40G突变加剧了这种毒性，导致严重LMP、线粒体去极化和动力蛋白亚基ACTR10的特异性转录下调。机制上，我们鉴定了一个保护性信号轴，涉及p38 MAPK、MK2和HSP27，该轴感知ANXA11诱导的溶酶体损伤并启动溶酶体自噬。值得注意的是，在人脑类器官中，这种溶酶体自噬清除的失败促进了ANXA11的胞质逃逸，从而加速其种子活性和向邻近细胞的传播。该通路的药理学或遗传学调控显著改变了神经元存活。我们的研究确立了溶酶体破裂是ANXA11相关神经变性的主要驱动因素，并验证了p38/MK2/HSP27轴是人类神经组织中的关键防御机制。这些发现提供了溶酶体质量控制与ANXA11传播之间的新机制联系，强调增强溶酶体自噬通量是阻止FTLD和ALS进展的有前景的转化策略。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究发表于2026年，利用人类iPSC衍生神经元和3D脑类器官模型，首次揭示溶酶体自噬在ANXA11相关ALS/FTLD中的保护机制，具有高度ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: The impedance mismatch theory: A non-equilibrium thermodynamic framework for a shared energetic stress pathway in neurodegeneration.
items.summary: Current neurobiological models of Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS), Multiple Sclerosis (MS), and Huntington's Disease (HD) utilize multi-omic interactome analyses to map cascades of proteinopathy. While essential, these approaches often overlook the macroscopic thermodynamic limits of the neural substrate as an information processing system. We propose the Impedance Mismatch Theory, a theoretical biophysical model and quantitative framework for the thermodynamic limits of neural computation, positing that these distinct pathologies converge as a shared energetic stress pathway. We introduce the Neurophysiological Load Index (NLI)-a dimensionless parameter quantifying the mismatch between electrical computational drive, topological network impedance, and the local structural and microvascular dissipation capacity. Drawing on the Pennes Bioheat Transfer Equation and insights from multiplex network theory, we hypothesize that pathology initiates as localized thermal runaway, where resistive metabolic heat exceeds convective blood perfusion and thermal conduction, inducing acute decompensation. We outline cross-translational disease-network mechanisms, address the inverse cancer comorbidity paradox via speculative bioelectric attractor states, and propose falsifiable predictions involving high-resolution in vivo proton magnetic resonance spectroscopy thermometry ( 1 H-MRS-t) and phosphorus-31 magnetic resonance spectroscopy ( 31 P-MRS).
items.titleZh: 阻抗失配理论：神经退行性疾病中共享能量应激通路的非平衡热力学框架
items.summaryZh: 该理论提出，ALS、MS和HD等神经退行性疾病可能共享一个由能量代谢失衡驱动的共同病理通路，而非仅由特定蛋白异常引起。作者引入“神经生理负荷指数”来量化神经计算中的能量供需失配，并认为局部热失控是疾病启动的关键事件。
items.insight: 该理论为ALS研究者提供了一个全新的宏观视角，将神经退行性疾病的启动机制从分子蛋白病转向能量热力学失衡，可能解释为何不同疾病在晚期表现出相似的代谢衰竭特征，并提示热成像或磁共振波谱测温可作为早期检测工具。

aiRead.keyFinding: 提出阻抗失配理论，认为神经退行性疾病源于神经计算中的能量供需失配导致的局部热失控，并引入神经生理负荷指数作为量化工具。
aiRead.limitation: 该理论目前为纯数学模型，缺乏直接的实验验证；所提出的可证伪预测（如¹H-MRS-t和³¹P-MRS）尚未在临床或动物模型中实施。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注后续研究是否在ALS动物模型或患者中利用高分辨率磁共振波谱测温验证局部热失控假说，以及神经生理负荷指数是否与疾病进展相关。

items.abstractZh: 当前关于肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）、多发性硬化症（MS）和亨廷顿病（HD）的神经生物学模型利用多组学相互作用组分析来绘制蛋白病级联反应。虽然这些方法至关重要，但它们常常忽略了作为信息处理系统的神经基质的宏观热力学极限。我们提出了阻抗失配理论，这是一个关于神经计算热力学极限的理论生物物理模型和定量框架，认为这些不同的病理学汇聚为一条共享的能量应激通路。我们引入了神经生理负荷指数（NLI）——一个无量纲参数，用于量化电计算驱动力、拓扑网络阻抗以及局部结构和微血管耗散能力之间的失配。借鉴Pennes生物热传递方程和多层网络理论的见解，我们假设病理学起始于局部热失控，其中电阻性代谢热超过对流血液灌注和热传导，诱发急性失代偿。我们概述了跨转化疾病网络机制，通过推测性的生物电吸引子状态解决了癌症共病悖论，并提出了可证伪的预测，涉及高分辨率体内质子磁共振波谱测温（¹H-MRS-t）和磷-31磁共振波谱（³¹P-MRS）。
items.frontierRationale: 该理论发表于2026年，首次将非平衡热力学框架系统性地应用于ALS等神经退行性疾病的共享能量应激通路，具有高度的理论前沿性和跨疾病转化价值。

items.title: Persistent deficits in the motor unit following mono and dual administration of SMN up-regulators in the SmnΔ7 mouse model of spinal muscular atrophy.
items.summary: Spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) is characterized by motor neuron loss and neuromuscular junction (NMJ) pathology. Although SMN-upregulating therapies such as Nusinersen markedly improve survival and motor function for many patients, impactful deficits often remain. In order to generate the next generation of therapy for SMA, it is critical that we understand the cellular basis for persistent deficits and find strategies to support and promote motor unit repair. Here we performed a detailed temporal analysis of the distal motor unit following administration of the Smn up-regulator Nusinersen in a range of differentially vulnerable cranial muscles in the SmnΔ7 mouse model. We show that early administration of Nusinersen facilitates progressive recovery of motor endplate innervation, even in the most vulnerable muscles. However, there is a persistent decrease in intramuscular motor axon number and increase in motor unit size, which is most severe in the most vulnerable muscles. We further show that combining Nusinersen with the Risdiplam tool compound SMN-C8 leads to a synergistic increase in Smn levels but does not produce broad improvements in motor unit recovery beyond those achieved with Nusinersen alone. Nevertheless, dual therapy resulted in significant improvement in hindlimb splay score from post-natal day 10 onwards. These effects suggest that enhanced SMN restoration may confer selective functional and structural benefits, although these were insufficient to fully rescue persistent motor unit pathology. Collectively, our findings demonstrate that early Smn restoration enables robust NMJ reinnervation but fails to prevent axon loss and motor unit remodelling. The limited additional benefit observed with dual SMN up-regulation, despite synergistic increases in Smn levels, suggests a potential ceiling effect for SMN-dependent rescue and highlights the need for adjunctive SMN-independent strategies aimed at preserving axons, stabilizing motor units, and promoting neuromuscular regeneration in SMA.
items.titleZh: 脊髓性肌萎缩症SmnΔ7小鼠模型中单次和联合使用SMN上调剂后运动单位的持续性缺陷
items.summaryZh: 本研究在SMA小鼠模型中显示，早期使用Nusinersen可促进神经肌肉接头修复，但无法阻止运动轴突丢失和运动单位重塑；联合使用Risdiplam类似物虽能协同提高SMN蛋白水平，但并未显著改善运动单位病理，提示SMN上调疗法存在疗效天花板。
items.insight: 该研究直接揭示了当前SMN上调疗法（如Nusinersen）在SMA中的局限性——即使早期干预也无法完全挽救运动单位病理，这为ALS等运动神经元病的研究提供了重要启示：单纯增强SMN可能不足以逆转远端轴突和运动单位的持续性损伤，需探索SMN非依赖性联合策略。

aiRead.keyFinding: 早期Nusinersen治疗可促进NMJ再神经支配，但无法阻止轴突丢失和运动单位重塑；联合SMN上调虽提高蛋白水平，但未显著改善病理，提示SMN依赖性挽救存在天花板效应。

items.abstractZh: 脊髓性肌萎缩症（SMA）的特征是运动神经元丢失和神经肌肉接头（NMJ）病理。尽管Nusinersen等SMN上调疗法显著改善了许多患者的生存和运动功能，但仍有明显的缺陷持续存在。为了开发下一代SMA疗法，理解持续性缺陷的细胞基础并寻找支持和促进运动单位修复的策略至关重要。本研究在SmnΔ7小鼠模型中，对一系列不同易损性的颅肌施用Smn上调剂Nusinersen后，对远端运动单位进行了详细的时间分析。结果显示，早期施用Nusinersen可促进运动终板神经支配的逐步恢复，即使在最易损的肌肉中也是如此。然而，肌内运动轴突数量持续减少，运动单位大小增加，这在最易损的肌肉中最为严重。进一步发现，将Nusinersen与Risdiplam工具化合物SMN-C8联合使用可协同增加Smn水平，但并未在运动单位恢复方面产生比单独使用Nusinersen更广泛的改善。尽管如此，联合治疗从出生后第10天起显著改善了后肢张开评分。这些效应表明，增强的SMN恢复可能带来选择性的功能和结构益处，但不足以完全挽救持续的运动单位病理。总之，我们的发现表明，早期Smn恢复可实现强大的NMJ再神经支配，但未能防止轴突丢失和运动单位重塑。尽管Smn水平协同增加，但双重SMN上调观察到的额外益处有限，提示SMN依赖性挽救可能存在天花板效应，并强调了在SMA中需要辅助性的SMN非依赖性策略，以保护轴突、稳定运动单位并促进神经肌肉再生。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究发表于2026年，聚焦SMA模型中对SMN上调疗法后持续性运动单位缺陷的机制解析，其发现的天花板效应和联合治疗局限性对ALS等神经退行性疾病的转化治疗策略具有直接参考价值。

items.title: Characterization of sensory nerve conduction abnormalities at the time of ALS diagnosis.
items.summary: Although sensory nerve abnormalities have been reported in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), their distribution at diagnosis, relative to motor involvement and clinical onset phenotype remains incompletely characterized. We aimed to systematically compare sensory and motor nerve conduction abnormalities at ALS diagnosis and determine whether sensory involvement follows an onset-dependent pattern similar to motor dysfunction. In this prospective cross-sectional study, 40 newly diagnosed ALS patients enrolled in the Iran University ALS Registry (March 2022-March 2023) underwent standardized motor and sensory nerve conduction studies (NCS). For between-group comparisons, a matched ALS subgroup was compared with matched healthy controls, while the expanded ALS cohort was used for subgroup and correlation analyses. SNAP amplitudes of the median, ulnar, and sural nerves were reduced by 45%, 34%, and 43%, respectively, compared with healthy controls, with similar reductions observed across upper- and lower-limb onset phenotypes and no significant onset-dependent differences. In contrast CMAP amplitudes were markedly reduced in ALS patients, most prominently in the peroneal (79%), median (47%), tibial (42%), and ulnar (37%) nerves. Motor abnormalities were most severe in the clinically affected limb but were also detectable in asymptomatic extremities, consistent with early subclinical spread. At ALS diagnosis, sensory and motor nerve conduction abnormalities exhibited divergent spatial patterns, with asymmetric, onset-related motor involvement and relatively uniform sensory axonal dysfunction. These findings support the presence of measurable sensory nerve conduction abnormalities in a subset of ALS patients, while highlighting the need for cautious interpretation of sensory NCS changes in ALS.
items.titleZh: ALS诊断时感觉神经传导异常的特征分析
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性研究对40名新诊断ALS患者进行神经传导检查，发现感觉神经动作电位（SNAP）波幅在正中、尺和腓肠神经分别降低45%、34%和43%，且与起病部位无关；而运动神经异常则呈不对称、起病依赖性分布。研究提示ALS诊断时已存在可测量的感觉轴突功能障碍，但需谨慎解读。
items.insight: 该研究系统量化了ALS诊断时感觉神经传导异常的分布模式，发现其与运动异常的空间模式不同，为理解ALS早期感觉系统受累提供了新证据，有助于鉴别诊断和疾病机制研究。

aiRead.studyType: 前瞻性横断面观察性临床研究
aiRead.keyFinding: ALS诊断时感觉神经传导异常呈相对均匀分布，与起病部位无关，而运动异常呈不对称、起病依赖性模式。
aiRead.limitation: 样本量较小（40例），且为单中心研究，可能限制结果的普适性；未进行长期随访以评估感觉异常的进展。
aiRead.watchNext: 后续研究应扩大样本量并纳入纵向随访，以明确感觉神经传导异常在ALS病程中的演变及其与预后的关系。

items.abstractZh: 尽管肌萎缩侧索硬化（ALS）中已有感觉神经异常的报道，但其在诊断时的分布、与运动受累及临床起病表型的关系尚未完全阐明。本研究旨在系统比较ALS诊断时的感觉与运动神经传导异常，并确定感觉受累是否遵循与运动功能障碍相似的起病依赖性模式。在这项前瞻性横断面研究中，40名新诊断的ALS患者（2022年3月至2023年3月入组伊朗大学ALS登记处）接受了标准化的运动和感觉神经传导研究（NCS）。在组间比较中，匹配的ALS亚组与匹配的健康对照进行比较，而扩大的ALS队列用于亚组和相关性分析。与健康对照相比，正中神经、尺神经和腓肠神经的SNAP波幅分别降低了45%、34%和43%，在上肢和下肢起病表型中观察到类似的降低，且无显著的起病依赖性差异。相比之下，ALS患者的CMAP波幅显著降低，最显著的是腓总神经（79%）、正中神经（47%）、胫神经（42%）和尺神经（37%）。运动异常在临床受累肢体中最为严重，但在无症状肢体中也可检测到，符合早期亚临床扩散。在ALS诊断时，感觉和运动神经传导异常表现出不同的空间模式：不对称的、与起病相关的运动受累和相对均匀的感觉轴突功能障碍。这些发现支持在部分ALS患者中存在可测量的感觉神经传导异常，同时强调了对ALS中感觉NCS变化进行谨慎解读的必要性。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究于2026年发表，基于新诊断ALS患者的前瞻性数据，揭示了感觉神经传导异常在诊断时的均匀分布模式，具有ALS早期诊断和机制探索的转化价值。

items.title: Targeting mtDNA to Modulate Mitochondrial Dysfunction in Neurodegenerative Diseases.
items.summary: Mitochondrial dysfunction is a common pathological feature of neurodegenerative diseases namely Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson's disease, amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, and Huntington's disease. Although these disorders are primarily driven by disease-specific genetic and proteopathic mechanisms, increasing evidence suggests that secondary mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) damage and heteroplasmy shifts may exacerbate bioenergetic failure and neuronal vulnerability. Distinguishing primary disease mechanisms from downstream mtDNA alterations is critical to accurately evaluate emerging therapeutic strategies. Recent advances in mtDNA-targeted genome editing have enabled the direct manipulation of mitochondrial genomes. Mitochondrially targeted zinc finger nucleases and TALENs can selectively alter mutant mtDNA to induce heteroplasmy shifts, whereas DddA-derived cytosine base editors allow precise base editing without double-strand breaks. However, each platform has distinct limitations related to the target scope, off-target risk, design complexity, and delivery efficiency. The application of CRISPR/Cas-based systems to mammalian mtDNA remains constrained by the unresolved challenges in guiding RNA import. This review critically examines mitochondrial dysfunction and mutant mtDNA accumulation in neurodegenerative diseases. It also evaluates current and emerging mtDNA-editing techniques, and highlights key translational barriers. We highlighted that mtDNA-targeted interventions can be a promising approach for disease-modifying or adjunctive strategies, rather than curative approaches.
items.titleZh: 靶向线粒体DNA调控神经退行性疾病中的线粒体功能障碍
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了线粒体DNA损伤在ALS等神经退行性疾病中的作用，并评估了多种mtDNA编辑技术（如锌指核酸酶、TALENs和碱基编辑器）的进展与局限，指出这些技术有望作为疾病修饰策略，但尚不能治愈。
items.insight: 该综述系统梳理了mtDNA编辑技术在ALS等疾病中的转化潜力，特别强调了区分原发机制与继发性mtDNA改变的重要性，为研究者设计靶向线粒体的治疗策略提供了关键参考。

aiRead.keyFinding: mtDNA损伤和异质性偏移加剧神经退行性疾病的生物能量衰竭，新兴mtDNA编辑技术（如锌指核酸酶、TALENs和碱基编辑器）可选择性改变突变mtDNA，但存在靶标范围、脱靶风险和递送效率等限制。
aiRead.limitation: 综述基于现有文献，未提供原始实验数据；CRISPR/Cas系统在哺乳动物mtDNA中的应用仍受RNA导入问题限制。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注mtDNA碱基编辑器在ALS动物模型中的体内递送效率验证，以及区分原发与继发性mtDNA改变的新方法开发。

items.abstractZh: 线粒体功能障碍是神经退行性疾病（包括阿尔茨海默病、帕金森病、肌萎缩侧索硬化症和亨廷顿病）的共同病理特征。尽管这些疾病主要由疾病特异性的遗传和蛋白质病变机制驱动，但越来越多的证据表明，继发性线粒体DNA损伤和异质性偏移可能加剧生物能量衰竭和神经元脆弱性。区分主要疾病机制与下游mtDNA改变对于准确评估新兴治疗策略至关重要。近期mtDNA靶向基因组编辑的进展使得直接操作线粒体基因组成为可能。线粒体靶向锌指核酸酶和TALENs可选择性地改变突变mtDNA以诱导异质性偏移，而DddA衍生的胞嘧啶碱基编辑器则可在不产生双链断裂的情况下进行精确碱基编辑。然而，每种平台在靶标范围、脱靶风险、设计复杂性和递送效率方面都有不同的局限性。基于CRISPR/Cas的系统在哺乳动物mtDNA中的应用仍受限于引导RNA导入的未解决挑战。本综述批判性地审视了神经退行性疾病中的线粒体功能障碍和突变mtDNA积累，评估了当前和新兴的mtDNA编辑技术，并强调了关键的转化障碍。我们指出，mtDNA靶向干预可作为一种有前景的疾病修饰或辅助策略，而非治愈性方法。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，聚焦于新兴mtDNA编辑技术（如DddA碱基编辑器）在ALS等神经退行性疾病中的转化价值，具有高度新近性和ALS相关性。

items.title: Noninvasive assessment of cardiovascular autonomic reflexes in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis: a systematic review.
items.summary: Dysautonomia is gradually recognized in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), raising concerns of secondary complications from heightened autonomic burden. Autonomic disturbances, particularly cardiac dysautonomia, significantly impact patient outcomes, contributing to increased cardiovascular risks and mortality rate. While the ALS Functional Rating Score-Revised (ALSFRS-R) measures functional decline as disease progress, it overlooks autonomic criteria - a critical factor in ALS progression. This review aims to analyze noninvasive applications of cardiovascular signal variability for continuous real-time monitoring of autonomic dysfunction in ALS, while addressing gaps in current clinical assessments. A total of 584 literatures were gathered from four databases (WoS, PubMed, Science Direct and MEDLINE EBSCOhost) - published from inception till December 2023. 21 peer-reviewed studies were included in this review after screening and meeting the inclusion criteria. Various cardiovascular signal variability metrics and autonomic protocols were discussed. Key findings highlight cardiac autonomic dysfunction in ALS is marked by reduced heart rate variability, absent blood pressure regulation upon orthostatic stress and circadian changes, prolonged QTc interval and low baroreflex sensitivity. Moreover, increased autonomic burden is associated with a shift from sympathetic to parasympathetic dysregulation as the disease progresses. Evidence highlights the need to integrate noninvasive autonomic biomarkers into digital ALS monitoring frameworks, enabling earlier detection of autonomic involvement and more precise longitudinal monitoring beyond motor decline.
items.titleZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症中心血管自主神经反射的无创评估：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这篇系统综述总结了21项研究，发现ALS患者存在显著的心脏自主神经功能障碍，包括心率变异性降低、血压调节异常和QTc间期延长。研究指出，现有临床评估工具（如ALSFRS-R）忽略了自主神经功能，建议将无创心血管信号监测纳入ALS数字管理框架，以更早发现自主神经受累并实现更全面的疾病监测。
items.insight: 该综述系统性地整合了ALS中心血管自主神经功能障碍的无创评估证据，强调了自主神经生物标志物在疾病监测中的潜在价值，为ALS研究者提供了将自主神经功能纳入临床评估和数字健康工具的理论基础，有助于推动ALS管理的精准化和多维度化。

aiRead.keyFinding: ALS患者存在心脏自主神经功能障碍，表现为心率变异性降低、血压调节缺失、QTc间期延长和压力反射敏感性降低，且随疾病进展从交感神经向副交感神经失调转变。
aiRead.limitation: 纳入研究数量有限（21篇），且各研究在方法学和患者群体上存在异质性，可能影响结论的普适性。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注将无创自主神经生物标志物（如心率变异性）整合到ALS临床试验和数字监测平台中的前瞻性研究。

items.abstractZh: 自主神经功能障碍在肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）中逐渐被认识，引发了对自主神经负荷增加所致继发性并发症的担忧。自主神经紊乱，特别是心脏自主神经功能障碍，显著影响患者预后，导致心血管风险增加和死亡率上升。虽然ALS功能评定量表修订版（ALSFRS-R）可测量疾病进展中的功能衰退，但它忽略了自主神经标准——这是ALS进展中的一个关键因素。本综述旨在分析心血管信号变异性的无创应用，用于ALS自主神经功能障碍的连续实时监测，同时指出现有临床评估中的空白。从四个数据库（WoS、PubMed、Science Direct和MEDLINE EBSCOhost）中收集了584篇文献，发表时间从建库至2023年12月。经过筛选并符合纳入标准后，本综述纳入了21篇同行评审研究。讨论了各种心血管信号变异性指标和自主神经方案。主要发现表明，ALS中的心脏自主神经功能障碍表现为心率变异性降低、直立应激和昼夜节律变化时血压调节缺失、QTc间期延长以及压力反射敏感性降低。此外，自主神经负荷增加与疾病进展中从交感神经向副交感神经失调的转变相关。证据强调了将无创自主神经生物标志物整合到数字ALS监测框架中的必要性，从而能够更早地检测自主神经受累，并在运动衰退之外进行更精确的纵向监测。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，系统总结了ALS中心血管自主神经功能障碍的无创评估方法，具有新近性，并直接关联ALS的转化价值，为开发数字监测框架提供了关键证据。
